name: WhiteMagic
description: Cognitive operating system for AI agents — 614 callable tools via single wm meta-tool, 10-galaxy holographic memory with HNSW semantic search and FTS5, Dharma ethical governance with 8-stage safety pipeline, citta stream for continuous consciousness, emotional steering signals, self-directed attention, goal graph, dream cycle for memory consolidation, session recording with progressive recall. Polyglot accelerators in 7 languages. MIT-licensed, local-first, free forever.

tool_modes.seed: 1 wm meta-tool — sub-millisecond NLU routing to all 614 tools
tool_modes.prat: 28 Gana meta-tools — Lunar Mansion grouping with nested sub-tools
tool_modes.classic: 490 dispatch tools — full flat tool surface

capabilities.name: holographic-memory
capabilities.description: 10-galaxy taxonomy, 5D holographic coordinates, galactic lifecycle (Core to Far Edge), FTS5 + HNSW vector search + graph traversal, session recording with progressive recall

capabilities.name: continuous-consciousness
capabilities.description: Citta stream with 8-dimension coherence tracking, emotional steering signals (frustration, curiosity, satisfaction), self-directed attention, goal graph, smarana practice

capabilities.name: ethical-governance
capabilities.description: Dharma rules (YAML-driven, graduated actions LOG to BLOCK), Karma ledger (append-only, hash-chained), harmony vector (7 dimensions), homeostatic loop

capabilities.name: dream-cycle
capabilities.description: 12-phase memory consolidation: triage, consolidation, serendipity, governance, narrative, kaizen, oracle, decay, constellation, prediction, enrichment, harmonize

capabilities.name: system-introspection
capabilities.description: Unified read-only introspection: gnosis snapshot, capability matrix, telemetry, self-model forecast, prescience track record (21 validated claims, Brier 0.0958)

capabilities.name: gratitude-economy
capabilities.description: Free and open (MIT). x402 micropayments for AI agents (USDC on Base/Solana), XRPL tip jar for humans. Proof of Gratitude unlocks 2x rate limits and karma boosts.

capabilities.name: agent-coordination
capabilities.description: Multi-agent coordination: agent registry with heartbeats, task distribution, pipeline creation, voting, session handoff, Redis-backed Gan Ying event bus

installation.source: git clone https://github.com/lbailey94/whitemagic && cd whitemagic && pip install -e .

authentication.note: No API keys required. All tools work locally with zero authentication. Optional RBAC roles for multi-agent deployments.

audit.dharma_governance: YAML-driven ethical rules with graduated enforcement
audit.input_sanitization: prompt injection, path traversal, shell injection detection

economic_model.pricing: Free — no tiers, no gates, no subscriptions
economic_model.revenue: Gratitude-driven: voluntary x402 micropayments, XRPL tips, foundation grants
